query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.openId, u.role, u.consultorId, u.alunoId, 
       c.role as consultorRole, c.managedProgramId
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON u.consultorId = c.id
WHERE u.role = 'manager' AND u.isActive = 1 AND u.consultorId IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY u.id DESC;
